articles.title: Congress leader doused in petrol, set ablaze by fellow workers in Warangal, succumbs on way to Hyd
articles.description: Congress worker A Mahesh, 52, was allegedly doused in petrol and set on fire by fellow party workers near Warangal; he died while being shifted to Hyderabad.

articles.title: Parliament Monsoon Session begins July 20: Delimitation, NEET paper leak, TMC rebellion among key flashpoints
articles.description: The Parliament Monsoon Session, which will continue till August 13, is expected to be stormy, with the opposition looking to corner the government over Ram Temple donation theft case, the NEET paper leak, the CJP protests, E20 petrol, price hike and delimitation.

articles.title: Dalal Street Week Ahead: West Asia conflict-led oil prices, Q1 earnings, rupee, flash PMI among 10 key factors to watch
articles.description: Overall, the market will remain volatile and consolidative with a positive bias and focus majorly on further June quarter earnings, and renewed West Asia tensions that impacts oil prices as well as rupee, according to experts.

articles.title: Tata Nexon Rebranded: Popular SUV Heading to South Africa as 'Osprey'
articles.description: Tata Motors plans to launch the Nexon in South Africa as the Osprey by the third quarter of 2026, marking its fifth product in that market. While the Osprey retains the same specifications as the Nexon, it will only offer a petrol engine option., Car News, Times Now

articles.title: US EV sales are down, but not out. Here’s why automakers won’t pull the plug

articles.title: How the Strait of Hormuz could affect Social Security checks as rising oil prices may boost 2027 COLA

articles.title: Andy Burnham set to be buoyed by June inflation slowdown
articles.description: Some economists think a sharp drop in petrol and diesel prices will have helped pull the overall inflation rate down to 2.4% in June, from 2.6% in May
